concerns.text: Task T022 implements a Bonferroni-corrected alpha (0.05/4) for the pass/fail flag, directly violating FR-006 which mandates the flag be based on the standard alpha = 0.05 threshold. This is a semantic weakening of the acceptance criteria.

Tasks T019 and T020 implement a custom Block Bootstrap deviation metric D without implementing the FR-003 requirement to 'automatically switch to an exact test or Monte Carlo simulation' if expected bin counts are < 5. The fallback logic is missing from the task list.

Task T027a requires 'research and define' error bound formulas. The Plan (Statistical Methodology) asserts these formulas are already available and used as the basis for the methodology. This task introduces a 'research' phase that contradicts the Plan's assertion of readiness, creating a silent drift in the implementation scope.

Task T004 defines the MemoryGuard to fail if usage reaches '>= 90%'. FR-007 requires failing if usage reaches '>= 90% of the limit'. While semantically similar, the task description lacks the explicit reference to 'limit' defined in the spec, risking implementation against a fixed system value rather than the configurable limit.
